enum_values.name: CompletionHandled
enum_values.summary: Post-execute action of task is completed and registered event handlers of task completion are notified.

enum_values.name: Discarded
enum_values.summary: Task is dropped from the scheduler due to compacting process

enum_values.name: ExecutionFailed
enum_values.summary: Task execution is completed with errors

enum_values.name: ExecutionStarting
enum_values.summary: Task is about to be executed

enum_values.name: Scheduled
enum_values.summary: Task is added to the scheduler
